visa_types.name: Friend and Family Visit
visa_types.documents_required:
Travel insurance is mandatory for all Schengen countries. If you have not purchased, please click here (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/vnm/en/aut/travel-insurance)
Please download documents required checklist
                                                                            here
If the applicant has not enough own financial
                                                                            means. Electronic guarantee letter, which
                                                                            can be applied for at the local police
                                                                            station in Austria, where the company is
                                                                            located/ registered. For more information
                                                                            please visit
https://www.bmeia.gv.at/ (https://www.bmeia.gv.at/)
Spouses of EU/EEA citizens (EEA:
                                                                                Norway, Iceland, Lichtenstein) traveling
                                                                                together
Documents provided by the applicant
- Visa application form, completed (block
                                                                                letters or with computer) and signed,
                                                                                with 2 attached recent photographs
                                                                                (photo must be: 35 mm wide, 45 mm high,
                                                                                photo must be well contrasted, person
                                                                                must look straight into the camera, head
                                                                                must be straight, not tilted, mouth
                                                                                closed, head must take up 2/3 of the
                                                                                photo, but must not exceed 36 mm in
                                                                                height, eyes must be in the upper middle
                                                                                of the photo, eye color must be clearly
                                                                                recognizable, distance between the two
                                                                                pupils must be between 8 and 10 mm,
                                                                                white background please).
- Current, valid passport (the passport
                                                                                must be valid three months longer than
                                                                                the expiry date of the requested visa).
- Photocopy of the first 3 pages of the
                                                                                passport and Schengen Visa (if
                                                                                available)
- Marriage/Birth certificates must be
                                                                                submitted with application as proof of
                                                                                relationship with EU/EEA spouse.
- Also provide air ticket which clearly
                                                                                shows that you will be traveling with
                                                                                the EU/EEA passport holder.
- Travel Insurance (minimum coverage
                                                                                30,000 €; policy must be issued by an
                                                                                accredited insurance company)
All copies of documents in Vietnamese must be
                                                                            translated into English or German and the
                                                                            translations shall be done by Department of
                                                                            Justice in the last 6 months.
The applicant must present the original and a
                                                                            true copy of each document at VFS for your
                                                                            visa application submission.
The Embassy reserves the right to ask for
                                                                            additional documents. The application form
                                                                            can only be processed after complete
                                                                            submission of all documents requested by the
                                                                            Embassy. The non-refundable visa fee has to
                                                                            be paid upon filing the application.
Important: Wrong statements
                                                                            by the applicant or submission of falsified
                                                                            or forged documents result in the refusal of
                                                                            the visa application.
visa_types.visa_fees:
The Visa Fees are as follows: 

[aut > vnm > en > Table:Business > Visa Fees 1]

Please Note:
- The applicable visa fee in VND is as per the current exchange rate. It is subject to change every month end.
- All the fees are non-refundable.
- There is a service charge of VND 801,000 levied on per application over and above the visa fees.
- The visa fee for applicants and VFS charges (service charges & other optional charges) applying to the Austria Visa Application Centre is payable by cash or card.
Visas are issued free of charge for:
- Children under age 6.
- School pupils, students, post graduate students and accompanying teachers who undertake trips for the purpose of study or educational training.
- Researchers from third countries travelling within the Community for the purpose of carrying out scientific research.
- Spouses of EU/EEA citizens (EEA: Norway, Iceland, Lichtenstein) and their children, under the age 21 – under certain circumstances (please verify with the relevant consular authority). On the condition at the marriage is recognized by the country of the EU partner. Original of spouses’ EU/EEA passport, Full Marriage/Full Birth certificates, etc must be submitted with application as proof of relationship with EU/EEA spouse/parent. Also provide air ticket which clearly shows that you will be traveling with the EU/EEA passport holder.
- Representatives of non-profit organizations aged 25 years or less participating in seminars, conferences, sports, cultural or educational events organized by non-profit organizations.
- Diplomatic and official passport holders with official Verbal Note.
Due to a bilateral agreement the visa application fee for applicants of the following countries amount to € 35, Ukraine, Albania, Bosnia-Herzegovina, Macedonia, Montenegro.
The visa fee is not refundable if a negative decision is taken on the application or if the application is withdrawn.
visa_types.processing_time:
Usually, processing time for visa applications is totally up to the the Embassy (starting from the time when the Embassy or Consulate received the application, not including the transportation time), counting from when all requested documents have been submitted. This period may be extended in specific cases, notably when further scrutiny of the application is required, for example, when an applicant must come to an interview or submit additional documentation requested by the Embassy or Consulate. During certain times of the year, the processing time can be longer due to the high volume of applications. It is recommended to submit your visa application at least two weeks prior to date of travel date and if possible, even earlier ahead of the holiday period. 
Please note that the application processing time and decisions on visa applications are the sole prerogative of the Embassy or Consulate. VFS Global has no role to play in these areas of the application process.
visa_types.overview:
Overview
This visa is for those who intend to visit
                                                                            their family or friends. If during any
                                                                            portion of their visit to Austria the
                                                                            applicant intends to engage in business, or
                                                                            official duties he/she must refer to other
                                                                            relevant visa categories.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
This visa is for those who intend to visit
                                                                            their family or friends. If during any
                                                                            portion of their visit to Austria the
                                                                            applicant intends to engage in business, or
                                                                            official duties he/she must refer to other
                                                                            relevant visa categories.

## Visa Fees
The Visa Fees are as follows: 

[aut > vnm > en > Table:Business > Visa Fees 1]

Please Note:
- The applicable visa fee in VND is as per the current exchange rate. It is subject to change every month end.
- All the fees are non-refundable.
- There is a service charge of VND 801,000 levied on per application over and above the visa fees.
- The visa fee for applicants and VFS charges (service charges & other optional charges) applying to the Austria Visa Application Centre is payable by cash or card.
Visas are issued free of charge for:
- Children under age 6.
- School pupils, students, post graduate students and accompanying teachers who undertake trips for the purpose of study or educational training.
- Researchers from third countries travelling within the Community for the purpose of carrying out scientific research.
- Spouses of EU/EEA citizens (EEA: Norway, Iceland, Lichtenstein) and their children, under the age 21 – under certain circumstances (please verify with the relevant consular authority). On the condition at the marriage is recognized by the country of the EU partner. Original of spouses’ EU/EEA passport, Full Marriage/Full Birth certificates, etc must be submitted with application as proof of relationship with EU/EEA spouse/parent. Also provide air ticket which clearly shows that you will be traveling with the EU/EEA passport holder.
- Representatives of non-profit organizations aged 25 years or less participating in seminars, conferences, sports, cultural or educational events organized by non-profit organizations.
- Diplomatic and official passport holders with official Verbal Note.
Due to a bilateral agreement the visa application fee for applicants of the following countries amount to € 35, Ukraine, Albania, Bosnia-Herzegovina, Macedonia, Montenegro.
The visa fee is not refundable if a negative decision is taken on the application or if the application is withdrawn.

## Documents Required
Travel insurance is mandatory for all Schengen countries. If you have not purchased, please click here (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/vnm/en/aut/travel-insurance)
Please download documents required checklist
                                                                            here
If the applicant has not enough own financial
                                                                            means. Electronic guarantee letter, which
                                                                            can be applied for at the local police
                                                                            station in Austria, where the company is
                                                                            located/ registered. For more information
                                                                            please visit
https://www.bmeia.gv.at/ (https://www.bmeia.gv.at/)
Spouses of EU/EEA citizens (EEA:
                                                                                Norway, Iceland, Lichtenstein) traveling
                                                                                together
Documents provided by the applicant
- Visa application form, completed (block
                                                                                letters or with computer) and signed,
                                                                                with 2 attached recent photographs
                                                                                (photo must be: 35 mm wide, 45 mm high,
                                                                                photo must be well contrasted, person
                                                                                must look straight into the camera, head
                                                                                must be straight, not tilted, mouth
                                                                                closed, head must take up 2/3 of the
                                                                                photo, but must not exceed 36 mm in
                                                                                height, eyes must be in the upper middle
                                                                                of the photo, eye color must be clearly
                                                                                recognizable, distance between the two
                                                                                pupils must be between 8 and 10 mm,
                                                                                white background please).
- Current, valid passport (the passport
                                                                                must be valid three months longer than
                                                                                the expiry date of the requested visa).
- Photocopy of the first 3 pages of the
                                                                                passport and Schengen Visa (if
                                                                                available)
- Marriage/Birth certificates must be
                                                                                submitted with application as proof of
                                                                                relationship with EU/EEA spouse.
- Also provide air ticket which clearly
                                                                                shows that you will be traveling with
                                                                                the EU/EEA passport holder.
- Travel Insurance (minimum coverage
                                                                                30,000 €; policy must be issued by an
                                                                                accredited insurance company)
All copies of documents in Vietnamese must be
                                                                            translated into English or German and the
                                                                            translations shall be done by Department of
                                                                            Justice in the last 6 months.
The applicant must present the original and a
                                                                            true copy of each document at VFS for your
                                                                            visa application submission.
The Embassy reserves the right to ask for
                                                                            additional documents. The application form
                                                                            can only be processed after complete
                                                                            submission of all documents requested by the
                                                                            Embassy. The non-refundable visa fee has to
                                                                            be paid upon filing the application.
Important: Wrong statements
                                                                            by the applicant or submission of falsified
                                                                            or forged documents result in the refusal of
                                                                            the visa application.

## Photo Specifications

[aut > npl > en > Table:Business Visa > Photo Specifications 1]

[aut > npl > en > Table:Business Visa > Photo Specifications 2]

[aut > npl > en > Table:Business Visa > Photo Specifications 3]

[aut > npl > en > Table:Business Visa > Photo Specifications 4]

## Processing Time
Usually, processing time for visa applications is totally up to the the Embassy (starting from the time when the Embassy or Consulate received the application, not including the transportation time), counting from when all requested documents have been submitted. This period may be extended in specific cases, notably when further scrutiny of the application is required, for example, when an applicant must come to an interview or submit additional documentation requested by the Embassy or Consulate. During certain times of the year, the processing time can be longer due to the high volume of applications. It is recommended to submit your visa application at least two weeks prior to date of travel date and if possible, even earlier ahead of the holiday period. 
Please note that the application processing time and decisions on visa applications are the sole prerogative of the Embassy or Consulate. VFS Global has no role to play in these areas of the application process.

## Download Form
Application form for Schengen Visa

As per instruction received from the Austrian
                                                                        Embassy applicant needs to sign on application
                                                                        form. Representative or travel agent must bring
                                                                        signed application form at the time of
                                                                        submission. 

## To Download a Form:
- Click on the form link
- When the form opens, save the form on your
                                                                            computer.
OR
- Press the right button on your mouse on the
                                                                            required link.
- Select Save Target As from the list
- Save the form on your computer.

visa_types.overview:
Overview
This visa is solely for the purpose of
                                                                        undertaking journeys by members of official
                                                                        delegations who, following an official
                                                                        invitation, participate in meetings,
                                                                        consultations, negotiations or exchange
                                                                        programs, as well as events held in Austria by
                                                                        intergovernmental organizations.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
This visa is solely for the purpose of
                                                                        undertaking journeys by members of official
                                                                        delegations who, following an official
                                                                        invitation, participate in meetings,
                                                                        consultations, negotiations or exchange
                                                                        programs, as well as events held in Austria by
                                                                        intergovernmental organizations.

## Visa Fees
Visa Fees
Diplomatic and official passport holders with official Verbal Note are exempted of visa fee.

Please Note:
- The applicable visa fee in VND is as per the current exchange rate. It is subject to change every month end.
- All the fees are non-refundable.
- There is a service charge of VND 801,000 levied on per application over and above the visa fees.
- The visa fee for applicants and VFS charges (service charges & other optional charges) applying to the Austria Visa Application Centre is payable by cash or card.
Visas are issued free of charge for:
- Children under age 6.
- School pupils, students, post graduate students and accompanying teachers who undertake trips for the purpose of study or educational training.
- Researchers from third countries travelling within the Community for the purpose of carrying out scientific research.
- Spouses of EU/EEA citizens (EEA: Norway, Iceland, Lichtenstein) and their children, under the age 21 – under certain circumstances (please verify with the relevant consular authority). On the condition that the marriage is recognized by the country of the EU partner. Original of spouses’ EU/EEA passport, Full Marriage/Full Birth certificates, etc must be submitted with application as proof of relationship with EU/EEA spouse/parent. Also provide air ticket which clearly shows that you will be traveling with the EU/EEA passport holder.
- Representatives of non-profit organizations aged 25 years or less participating in seminars, conferences, sports, cultural or educational events organized by non-profit organizations.
- Diplomatic and official passport holders with official Verbal Note.
Due to a bilateral agreement the visa application fee for applicants of the following countries amount to € 35, Ukraine, Albania, Bosnia-Herzegovina, Macedonia, Montenegro.
The visa fee is not refundable if a negative decision is taken on the application or if the application is withdrawn.

## Documents Required
Travel insurance is mandatory for all Schengen countries. If you have not purchased, please click here (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/vnm/en/aut/travel-insurance)
Please download documents required checklist
                                                                            here
All copies of documents in Vietnamese must be
                                                                            translated into English or German and the
                                                                            translations shall be done by Department of
                                                                            Justice in the last 6 months.
The applicant must present the original and a
                                                                            true copy of each document at VFS for your
                                                                            visa application submission.
The Embassy reserves the right to ask for
                                                                            additional documents. The application form
                                                                            can only be processed after complete
                                                                            submission of all documents requested by the
                                                                            Embassy. The non-refundable visa fee has to
                                                                            be paid upon filing the application.
Important: Wrong statements

During certain times of the year, the processing time can be longer due to the high volume of applications. It is recommended to submit your visa application at least two weeks prior to date of travel date and if possible, even earlier ahead of the holiday period. 
Please note that the application processing time and decisions on visa applications are the sole prerogative of the Embassy or Consulate. VFS Global has no role to play in these areas of the application process.

visa_types.overview:
Overview
Tourist Visa is given to those visiting Austria
                                                                        for tourism or other non-business related
                                                                        purposes.

Important: Wrong statements by
                                                                        the applicant or submission of falsified or
                                                                        forged documents result in the refusal of the
                                                                        visa application.
visa_types.visa_fees:
The Visa Fees are as follows: 

[aut > vnm > en > Table:Business > Visa Fees 1]

Please Note:
- The applicable visa fee in VND is as per the current exchange rate. It is subject to change every month end.
- All the fees are non-refundable.
- There is a service charge of VND 801,000 levied on per application over and above the visa fees.
- The visa fee for applicants and VFS charges (service charges & other optional charges) applying to the Austria Visa Application Centre is payable by cash or card.
Visas are issued free of charge for:
- Children under age 6.
- School pupils, students, post graduate students and accompanying teachers who undertake trips for the purpose of study or educational training.
- Researchers from third countries travelling within the Community for the purpose of carrying out scientific research.
- Spouses of EU/EEA citizens (EEA: Norway, Iceland, Lichtenstein) and their children, under the age 21 – under certain circumstances (please verify with the relevant consular authority). On the condition at the marriage is recognized by the country of the EU partner. Original of spouses’ EU/EEA passport, Full Marriage/Full Birth certificates, etc must be submitted with application as proof of relationship with EU/EEA spouse/parent. Also provide air ticket which clearly shows that you will be traveling with the EU/EEA passport holder.
- Representatives of non-profit organizations aged 25 years or less participating in seminars, conferences, sports, cultural or educational events organized by non-profit organizations.
- Diplomatic and official passport holders with official Verbal Note.
Due to a bilateral agreement the visa application fee for applicants of the following countries amount to € 35, Ukraine, Albania, Bosnia-Herzegovina, Macedonia, Montenegro.
The visa fee is not refundable if a negative decision is taken on the application or if the application is withdrawn.
visa_types.processing_time:
Usually, processing time for visa applications is totally up to the the Embassy (starting from the time when the Embassy or Consulate received the application, not including the transportation time), counting from when all requested documents have been submitted. This period may be extended in specific cases, notably when further scrutiny of the application is required, for example, when an applicant must come to an interview or submit additional documentation requested by the Embassy or Consulate. During certain times of the year, the processing time can be longer due to the high volume of applications. It is recommended to submit your visa application at least two weeks prior to date of travel date and if possible, even earlier ahead of the holiday period. 
Please note that the application processing time and decisions on visa applications are the sole prerogative of the Embassy or Consulate. VFS Global has no role to play in these areas of the application process.
visa_types.overview:
Overview
A Business Visa is given those who are doing
                                                                        business in Austria such as making sales or
                                                                        establishing contacts on behalf of a company
                                                                        outside Vietnam.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
A Business Visa is given those who are doing
                                                                        business in Austria such as making sales or
                                                                        establishing contacts on behalf of a company
                                                                        outside Vietnam.

## Visa Fees
The Visa Fees are as follows: 

[aut > vnm > en > Table:Business > Visa Fees 1]

Please Note:
- The applicable visa fee in VND is as per the current exchange rate. It is subject to change every month end.
- All the fees are non-refundable.
- There is a service charge of VND 801,000 levied on per application over and above the visa fees.
- The visa fee for applicants and VFS charges (service charges & other optional charges) applying to the Austria Visa Application Centre is payable by cash or card.
Visas are issued free of charge for:
- Children under age 6.
- School pupils, students, post graduate students and accompanying teachers who undertake trips for the purpose of study or educational training.
- Researchers from third countries travelling within the Community for the purpose of carrying out scientific research.
- Spouses of EU/EEA citizens (EEA: Norway, Iceland, Lichtenstein) and their children, under the age 21 – under certain circumstances (please verify with the relevant consular authority). On the condition at the marriage is recognized by the country of the EU partner. Original of spouses’ EU/EEA passport, Full Marriage/Full Birth certificates, etc must be submitted with application as proof of relationship with EU/EEA spouse/parent. Also provide air ticket which clearly shows that you will be traveling with the EU/EEA passport holder.
- Representatives of non-profit organizations aged 25 years or less participating in seminars, conferences, sports, cultural or educational events organized by non-profit organizations.
- Diplomatic and official passport holders with official Verbal Note.
Due to a bilateral agreement the visa application fee for applicants of the following countries amount to € 35, Ukraine, Albania, Bosnia-Herzegovina, Macedonia, Montenegro.
The visa fee is not refundable if a negative decision is taken on the application or if the application is withdrawn.

## Documents Required
Travel insurance is mandatory for all Schengen countries. If you have not purchased, please click here (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/vnm/en/aut/travel-insurance)
Please download documents required checklist here
If the applicant has not enough own financial
                                                                        means. Electronic guarantee letter, which can be
                                                                        applied for at the local police station in
                                                                        Austria, where the company is located/
                                                                        registered. For more information please visit
                                                                    
https://www.bmeia.gv.at/ (https://www.bmeia.gv.at/)
All copies of documents in Vietnamese must be
                                                                        translated into English or German and the
                                                                        translations shall be done by Department of
                                                                        Justice in the last 6 months.
The applicant must present the original and a
                                                                        true copy of each document at VFS for your visa
                                                                        application submission.
The Embassy reserves the right to ask for
                                                                        additional documents. The application form can
                                                                        only be processed after complete submission of
                                                                        all documents requested by the Embassy. The
                                                                        non-refundable visa fee has to be paid upon
                                                                        filing the application.
Important: Wrong statements by
                                                                        the applicant or submission of falsified or
                                                                        forged documents result in the refusal of the
                                                                        visa application.

## Photo Specifications

[aut > npl > en > Table:Business Visa > Photo Specifications 1]

[aut > npl > en > Table:Business Visa > Photo Specifications 2]

[aut > npl > en > Table:Business Visa > Photo Specifications 3]

[aut > npl > en > Table:Business Visa > Photo Specifications 4]

## Processing Time
Usually, processing time for visa applications is totally up to the the Embassy (starting from the time when the Embassy or Consulate received the application, not including the transportation time), counting from when all requested documents have been submitted. This period may be extended in specific cases, notably when further scrutiny of the application is required, for example, when an applicant must come to an interview or submit additional documentation requested by the Embassy or Consulate. During certain times of the year, the processing time can be longer due to the high volume of applications. It is recommended to submit your visa application at least two weeks prior to date of travel date and if possible, even earlier ahead of the holiday period. 
Please note that the application processing time and decisions on visa applications are the sole prerogative of the Embassy or Consulate. VFS Global has no role to play in these areas of the application process.

## Download Form
Application form for Schengen Visa

As per instruction received from the Austrian
                                                                        Embassy applicant needs to sign on application
                                                                        form. Representative or travel agent must bring
                                                                        signed application form at the time of
                                                                        submission. 

## To Download a Form:
- Click on the form link
- When the form opens, save the form on your
                                                                            computer.
OR
- Press the right button on your mouse on the
                                                                            required link.
- Select Save Target As from the list
- Save the form on your computer.

visa_types.name: Long Term Visa (D)
visa_types.overview:
[aut > vnm > en > Long Term Visa (D)]
If you intend to stay in Austria for more than 90 but less than 180 days as a student, on a business trip, applicants who pick-up their residence permit in Austria, or you intend to take up short term employment (less than 6 months) AND you are neither an EU nor an EFTA citizen, you need a National Austrian visitor visa (Visa D). The Visa D also entitles you to stay up to 90 days, within the validity of the Visa D, to enter other Schengen countries.
Please click here for Long Term Visa Application Form.
Please Note:
- Visa fee and service fees to be paid in Vietnamese Dong.
- The applicable visa fee in VND is as per the current exchange rate. It is subject to change every month end.
- There is a VFS service charge of VND 801,000 levied on per application over and above the visa fees.
- All the fees are non-refundable.
- The visa fee for applicants and service charges applying to the Austria Visa Application Centre is payable by Cash and Debit/ Credit Card.
visa_types.full_text:
[aut > vnm > en > Long Term Visa (D)]
If you intend to stay in Austria for more than 90 but less than 180 days as a student, on a business trip, applicants who pick-up their residence permit in Austria, or you intend to take up short term employment (less than 6 months) AND you are neither an EU nor an EFTA citizen, you need a National Austrian visitor visa (Visa D). The Visa D also entitles you to stay up to 90 days, within the validity of the Visa D, to enter other Schengen countries.
Please click here for Long Term Visa Application Form.
Please Note:
- Visa fee and service fees to be paid in Vietnamese Dong.
- The applicable visa fee in VND is as per the current exchange rate. It is subject to change every month end.
- There is a VFS service charge of VND 801,000 levied on per application over and above the visa fees.
- All the fees are non-refundable.
- The visa fee for applicants and service charges applying to the Austria Visa Application Centre is payable by Cash and Debit/ Credit Card.

visa_types.name: Short Term Visa (C)
visa_types.overview:
Short Stay visa entitles an alien, who does not hold a
                                                            residence permit, to stay in Austria for an uninterrupted
                                                            period or a total of successive periods of stays that does
                                                            not exceed 90 days in every six months since the date of
                                                            first entry.
After scrutinizing the application, your application may have
                                                            the following. 
- Visa applied for is granted.
- Further documentation is requested.
- Applicant is requested to appear for a personal
                                                                interview.
- The application is rejected.
Short stay visa must be submitted at least 15 days but not
                                                            over 180 days in advance before the proposed travel date.
                                                            VFS Global is the outsourcing office responsible for the
                                                            reception and release of passports for short stay visa
                                                            applications processed by Embassy of Austria in Hanoi.
Please note below points :
The visa is an instrument of the immigration policy of the
                                                            State; therefore, obtaining a visa is not a right.
The visa application must be submitted in person
The procedure may take up to 15 days (less or more depending
                                                            on the case).
Non Vietnamese citizen residing in Vietnam must present proof
                                                            of a long stay visa, work permit and re-entry visa, these
                                                            documents should be valid for at least 3 months after
                                                            intended departure date from Schengen area. Only legal
                                                            residents in Vietnam can request a Schengen visa at the
                                                            Embassy of Austria in Hanoi.
Presenting all mentioned documents does not imply or
                                                            guarantee that the visa will be granted, but that these
                                                            documents are part of the for the visa application process.
                                                            The final decision lies with the Embassy of Austria.
All documents should be translated in German or English.
Where the Austrian Embassy has decided to cooperate with an
                                                            external service provider for the collection of
                                                            applications, applicants should hand in their applications
                                                            at those Visa Application Centers.
